items.name: clean-branches
items.title: Clean Branches
items.description: List local Git branches that have been fully merged or are stale and delete them safely after showing what would be removed. Protects main, master, develop, and the currently checked-out branch. Pass --dry-run to preview without deleting anything. Distinct from the finish-branch skill, which closes a single active in-progress branch; this cleans up accumulated merged branches across the whole repository. Use when local branches have accumulated and need safe cleanup.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
